abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

abilities.name: Manipulative
abilities.text: If this model has not yet activated this turn, enemy models may not cheat fate in opposed duels with this model.

actions.name: Lucky Break
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has already activated this turn, this action receives +(r) to its duel total.

triggers.name: Dowsing Stick
triggers.text: Move up to 3" toward a Scheme marker in LoS, ignoring vertical distance.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: "I've Struck a Vein!"
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models. Choose a piece of terrain within range. Move the target up to its Sp toward the chosen piece of terrain.

triggers.name: Lover's Leap
triggers.text: Move the target up to 4". If it is dealt falling damage, increase that damage by +1.

actions.name: Earth's Bounty
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Choose a Remains or Scheme marker in LoS. Move this model up to 5" toward the chosen marker. If this model ends the move within 1" of the chosen marker, remove the chosen marker.
